themes: Managers across franchise, multifamily, fitness, and hospitality brands are waiting far too long for a Product conversation, with the median wait exceeding 200 days and several contacts past 300 days, signaling a need for faster, more systematic outreach.

The backlog is dominated by a single user level—Managers—suggesting that mid-level operators who run day-to-day location workflows and reports are the primary audience requesting product input, and messaging should emphasize time savings and workflow efficiency.

Several accounts appear multiple times (Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Holiday Inn Express, Avenue5 Residential, Ford, Anytime Fitness, Orangetheory Fitness, 29th Street Living, Vetcor, Balfour Beatty Communities, Garner, LivCor, Neighborly, Cruise Planners), indicating deep organizational interest in Product dialogue and an opportunity to consolidate conversations or establish dedicated account touchpoints.
